AN EF0 TORNADO DEVELOPED NEAR SOUTHWEST 59TH STREET AND SARA ROAD AND MOVED NORTHEAST INTO OKLAHOMA COUNTY NEAR SOUTHWEST 29TH STREET. TREES... POWER LINES AND OUTBUILDINGS WERE DAMAGED. THIS TORNADO WAS EMBEDDED WITHIN A LARGE AREA OF THUNDERSTORM WIND DAMAGE THAT WAS OBSERVED NEAR AND SOUTH OF THE TORNADO PATH.
